pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh confirm this is the correct target path for the experiment file to be created.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh confirm this is the correct target path for the anchors conditions file.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh confirm this is the correct target path for the probes conditions file.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to create an experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/temporal_bisection.psyexp, and two condition files at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/anchors.csv and /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/probes.csv. These paths are confirmed as the correct target locations.
